Franchise Access

Enter your unique ID number to gain access to exclusive business insights.

Incorrect ID number. Please try again.
Confidential Franchise Information

More Business Insight

Strategic roadmap for scaling your Kedi franchise to 2X returns.

Personal Website Benefits

  • Congratulations on joining our MLM businesses! There are several ways to earn and do your monthly Point Value (PV).
  • Website Marketing & Franchise: Market our products and services by simply sharing links on social platforms using your unique ID.
  • Ownership Transfer: Get your professional website by sending us your business mail, WhatsApp number, and WhatsApp group link. We transfer ownership to you for FREE.
  • Optimization Seminar: Learn how to optimize products on your website (DIY) to help potential buyers reach you directly.

Ways to Earn 2X

  • Online Strategy: Provide solutions to health challenges, prescribe products, and sell online via your website.
  • Offline Strategy: Direct engagement and clinical presentations.
  • These two ways combined give you 2X RETURNS on any products sold.

Full Income Plan

Every Rank Breakdown

Here's exactly what you earn, what you need to qualify, and what perks come with each level.

Entry
Tier 1

â­ Star 1

Min PV: 100 | Team: 0
â‚¦5kâ€“â‚¦20k/mo
  • 10% Personal PV Bonus

â­â­â­ Star 3

Maximize Your Returns

Combining Digital Presence with Clinical Excellence is the secret to 2X revenue growth in the Kedi ecosystem.

1. Digital Solution

Leverage your personal website to reach thousands.

  • Social Media Sharing
  • Online Consultations
  • Automated PV Tracking
  • Global Lead Generation

2. Clinical Solution

Expert-led offline sales & consultations.

  • Medical Basics & Training
  • Medical Seminars
  • Medical Presentations
  • Medical Testing Protocols
